svg.title: research-git capture and recall workflow in Codex
svg.desc: Codex captures an optional negative-total clamp as a Capsule, then reapplies it to a tax-aware calculator.

g.text: › Add an optional clamp for negative totals, test it, and capture the feature.
? Keep this Capsule, or discard it?
› Bring back the clamp on the current tax-aware calculator.
• Applied Capsule to the current tax-aware implementation
└ Preserved tax calculation and restored the optional clamp.

text.tspan: 4 + return max(0, total) if clamp_negative else total

g.text: • Reapplied without rolling back the tax-aware refactor.
